headlines.title: How to transfer Apple Cash to your bank account
American Express® Business Gold Card review: Generous welcome offer and high rewards rates
Understanding crypto yield farming
Dow Jones Futures: S&P 500, Nasdaq Still Near Highs As Nvidia, Walmart Earnings Loom
Robust Revenue and Earnings Growth Assert StandardAero, Inc. (SARO) as a Top Undervalued Aerospace and Defense Stock to Buy
UK exports to U.S. plunge by 25% after Trump's 'liberation day' tariffs blitz
headlines.desc: The U.K. is now running a trade deficit with its largest trading partner.

headlines.title: Fed dissenters explain 'no' votes, saying they disagreed with hinting next move would be a cut
headlines.desc: Federal Reserve officials who voted this week against the post-meeting statement said they didn't think it was appropriate to signal that the next interest rate move would be lower.

headlines.title: Coinbase posts steep first-quarter loss after slide in crypto prices; shares fall 4%
headlines.desc: Crypto trading platform Coinbase reported a surprise first-quarter loss and weaker-than-estimated revenue after the market close Thursday.

headlines.title: U.S. payrolls jump more than expected, but the report had several red flags for the economy
headlines.desc: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 55,000 in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

headlines.title: Nvidia's trillion-dollar run puts pressure on the bulls
headlines.desc: Nvidia's market cap is now just shy of $5.7 trillion, up from $4.7 trillion as of market close last Tuesday.

headlines.title: The Federal Reserve is quickly running out of reasons to cut interest rates
headlines.desc: Friday's jobs report provided evidence that the central bank's larger concern is a cost of living that is getting increasingly hard to bear.

headlines.title: Bill Ackman built Microsoft stake in first quarter during sell-off, betting on AI and cloud growth
headlines.desc: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Capital Management has built a position in Microsoft, the billionaire hedge fund manager said Friday in a post on X.

headlines.title: Meet the Nvidias of power — 5 stocks winning Big Tech’s $700 billion AI energy grab
headlines.desc: Infrastructure giants such as GE Vernova and Bloom Energy are the new gatekeepers of the AI grid.

headlines.title: Al Jazeera’s exclusive report from the Strait of Hormuz
headlines.desc: Heavy ship traffic and rising regional tensions over one of the world’s most critical energy routes.

headlines.title: For better or worse, investors are living through Trump’s stock market. Here's why
headlines.desc: President Donald Trump has been considered the ultimate stock market president, overseeing an expansion to record highs as well as major declines.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts recommend these 3 dividend stocks for stable income
headlines.desc: Dividend-paying stocks can help cushion downside risk while offering consistent returns.

headlines.title: This 'win-win' hedge trade is getting popular with traders
headlines.desc: The trade is fairly simple: sell downside protection in semiconductor names where volatility is expensive, and buy downside protection in the S&P 500, where it's relatively cheap.

headlines.title: Goldman says tech stock 'up crash' is sign of even more gains to come
headlines.desc: Stocks are rallying so fast it's creating a volatility dynamic that's only been seen four times in history.

headlines.title: Gemini surges after Winklevoss Capital Fund invests $100 million in the crypto exchange
headlines.desc: The company also topped revenue expectations for the quarter and posted a narrower-than-expected loss than analysts anticipated, according to FactSet.

headlines.title: Bulls are piling into this Warren Buffett favorite ahead of earnings
headlines.desc: Traders piled into bullish options trades on Occidental Petroleum ahead of its earnings report on Tuesday.

headlines.title: Gold and oil have been two of the hottest trades of the past one year. One of them has to break
headlines.desc: What's good for energy stocks may be bad for precious metals if the rally in crude means a rise in Treasury yields, which usually means lower gold prices.

headlines.title: Coinbase cuts headcount by 14% citing AI acceleration
headlines.desc: Coinbase will cut roughly 14% of its workforce, citing a combination of market volatility and the how AI is quickly changing how the company operates.

headlines.title: Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy breaks from 'never sell' approach to the flagship crypto
headlines.desc: Strategy is shifting from passive bitcoin accumulation to actively managing balance sheet to boost bitcoin per share value.

headlines.title: Consumer prices rose 3.8% annually in April, the highest since May 2023
headlines.desc: The consumer price index was expected to increase by 3.7% annually in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

headlines.title: Even if an Iran deal calms energy markets, one oil stock can still stand out
headlines.desc: Shell plc (SHEL), along with other large integrated oil companies, have benefited from higher oil prices and should warrant investor attention.

headlines.title: Wholesale inflation jumps 6% in April on annual basis, biggest increase since 2022
headlines.desc: The producer price index was expected to increase 0.5% in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

headlines.title: The gold chart looks poised for a bounce. How to play it for less
headlines.desc: If you've been watching the SPDR Gold Shares (GLD), you know the yellow metal has been consolidating and appears to be bouncing off its 150-day moving average (support).
